title: WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Obstetric and Gynecological care. Services include contraceptives, menopause counseling and therapy, STD counseling and treatment, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, genetic testing and screening, pap tests, and transgender hormone therapy. Mother and infant care services, birth control, infertility services and pregnancy testing offered. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-8363 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Payment plans available. Care Credit accepted. Billing department can provide quote prior to appointment. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Jackson, and Josephine Counties Services: Birth Control Counseling Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Contraception Genetic Testing and Screening Infertility Services Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Postpartum Care Pregnancy Testing Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization * Women Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - CHILDBIRTH CLASSES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BOOT CAMP FOR NEW DADS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
